steps.title: Identify the stated limitation
steps.content: The passage directly identifies the drawback: “data from Places API tend to be restricted to places that are customer facing.” This means not all types of amenities in a neighborhood would be captured.

steps.title: Apply the limitation to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly captures this limitation—if data only include customer-facing places, conclusions won't represent all amenities in the neighborhood. Choices A, B, and D each describe problems not mentioned in the text. That matches choice C — C is correct.
